operational_insights.title: Critical Downtime on Backend Servers
operational_insights.summary: Servers went down on 2026-04-29 impacting client-facing systems.
operational_insights.recommended_action: Immediate resolution required to restore service continuity.
operational_insights.explanation: Server downtime likely caused by network security updates.

operational_insights.explanation: Delayed feedback on design elements affecting timeline.
